overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking along a waterfront promenade in a dense futuristic city. The character moves from a covered walkway through open palm-lined streets and under neon-lit overpasses, with heavy cyberpunk architecture and moderate pedestrian and vehicle traffic throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered waterfront walkway transitioning to open promenade

events.description: exits covered walkway into open waterfront promenade with bright sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront path beneath an orange overhang, passing a digital kiosk and twisted tree

entered.detail: orange concrete overhang providing partial shade over the walkway
gnarled tree with sparse foliage growing from a blue planter
tall digital display showing advertisements near the railing
black metal safety barrier separating walkway from water
futuristic skyscrapers with neon signage visible in the hazy distance

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a covered walkway with an orange concrete roof. The character walks past a distinctive twisted tree and digital kiosk, emerging into bright sunlight along a waterfront promenade with the city skyline visible across the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront promenade lined with palm trees

agents.ego_description: continuing along the wide waterfront sidewalk with traffic on the left and water on the right, passing palm trees

entered.detail: row of tall palm trees lining the edge of the walkway
multi-level highway interchange with vehicles visible on upper decks
dense collection of colorful digital advertisements on building facades
tall cyberpunk buildings with glass and neon exterior details

segments.scene_description: Walking along an open waterfront promenade bathed in bright sunlight, with palm trees lining the left side and futuristic commercial buildings featuring neon billboards. The elevated highway structure looms ahead in the distance while vehicles pass by on the adjacent road.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense commercial street approaching elevated interchange

events.description: purple sports car drives past on the left side road followed by other traffic

agents.ego_description: walking through increasingly dense pedestrian traffic with shops and advertisements lining the left side

notable_agents.action: purple sports car with white stripes driving past on the parallel road

entered.detail: tall traffic signals with red lights visible above the street
small colorful market stalls and kiosks along the building edge

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a denser commercial zone with moderate pedestrian traffic and street vendors. A purple sports car speeds past on the left as the character approaches the massive elevated highway structure that now dominates the center of view.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under neon-lit elevated highway

events.description: enters the shadow of the overpass with purple and blue neon lights illuminating the walkway from above

agents.ego_description: walking beneath the massive highway structure through purple-lit shadows with dense crowds

notable_agents.action: person with distinctive red hair walking ahead in the crowd

entered.detail: underside of the highway glowing with purple and blue neon lighting
massive concrete pillars supporting the elevated highway above
futuristic automated vending machine with glowing interface

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath the massive elevated highway, the scene shifts to dramatic purple and blue neon lighting casting colored shadows on the pavement. Structural columns line the left side while the character moves through moderate crowds under the glowing overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront edge overlooking canal with sun reflection

events.description: camera turns right to face the water and skyline, shifting from forward walking to observing the view

agents.ego_description: stops or slows to look out over the canal at the sun reflecting off the water and the distant skyline

entered.detail: calm water of the urban canal reflecting the bright sunlight
bright sun glare shimmering on the water surface
industrial docking platforms and structures along the far water edge

segments.scene_description: The camera turns to face the water, revealing a stunning view of the canal with bright sun reflection and the distant cyberpunk skyline silhouetted against the light. The character pauses to observe the waterfront scene, leaving the neon shadows of the overpass behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered urban walkway into a sun-drenched promenade before descending into the neon shadows of a massive overpass. It begins under an orange concrete roof, passing a twisted tree and digital kiosk before emerging into bright sunlight along a waterfront lined with palm trees and futuristic billboards. As the character advances, the scene shifts into a denser commercial zone filled with street vendors and passing traffic, leading directly toward a looming elevated highway. The environment then transitions into a dramatic subterranean atmosphere of purple and blue neon lighting as the camera moves beneath the highway's structural columns and through moderate crowds. Finally, the camera turns away from the glowing overpass to face the water, revealing a shimmering canal and the distant cyberpunk skyline silhouetted against the bright sun.
